title: Looking for Category Manager at Vision Express India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Vision Express India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Vision Express India family as a Category Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Vision Express India:
Vision Express India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vision Express India!
